content.json:
# Azure VM Inventory

Live inventory of all Virtual Machines across selected subscriptions. Data is sourced from **Azure Resource Graph** in real time — no agents, no scripts, no storage account needed. Use the filters below to scope the view, then pin any tile to your Azure Dashboard with the pin icon (top-right of each section).

parameters.name: ResourceGroups
parameters.query:
Resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines'
| where subscriptionId in~ ({Subscriptions}) or '*' in ({Subscriptions})
| distinct resourceGroup
| order by resourceGroup asc

parameters.name: Locations
parameters.query:
Resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines'
| where subscriptionId in~ ({Subscriptions}) or '*' in ({Subscriptions})
| distinct location
| order by location asc

content.query:
Resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines'
| where (subscriptionId in~ ({Subscriptions})) or ('*' in ({Subscriptions}))
| where (resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroups})) or ('*' in ({ResourceGroups}))
| where (location in~ ({Locations})) or ('*' in ({Locations}))
| extend osType = tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.osType)
| where (osType in~ ({OSType})) or ('*' in ({OSType}))
| extend powerState = tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.powerState.displayStatus)
| where (powerState in~ ({PowerState})) or ('*' in ({PowerState}))
| extend osDiskGB = toint(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.diskSizeGB)
| extend dataDiskGB = toint(array_sum(extract_all(@'"diskSizeGB":\s*(\d+)', tostring(properties.storageProfile.dataDisks))))
| summarize
    ['Total VMs'] = count(),
    ['Running'] = countif(powerState =~ 'VM running'),
    ['Stopped/Deallocated'] = countif(powerState !~ 'VM running'),
    ['Windows'] = countif(osType =~ 'Windows'),
    ['Linux'] = countif(osType =~ 'Linux'),
    ['OS Disk (GB)'] = sum(osDiskGB),
    ['Data Disk (GB)'] = sum(dataDiskGB)

Resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines'
| where (subscriptionId in~ ({Subscriptions})) or ('*' in ({Subscriptions}))
| where (resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroups})) or ('*' in ({ResourceGroups}))
| where (location in~ ({Locations})) or ('*' in ({Locations}))
| extend osType = tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.osType)
| where (osType in~ ({OSType})) or ('*' in ({OSType}))
| extend powerState = tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.powerState.displayStatus)
| where (powerState in~ ({PowerState})) or ('*' in ({PowerState}))
| summarize Count = count() by Location = location
| order by Count desc
content.title: VMs by Region

content.query:
Resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines'
| where (subscriptionId in~ ({Subscriptions})) or ('*' in ({Subscriptions}))
| where (resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroups})) or ('*' in ({ResourceGroups}))
| where (location in~ ({Locations})) or ('*' in ({Locations}))
| extend osType = tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.osType)
| where (osType in~ ({OSType})) or ('*' in ({OSType}))
| extend powerState = tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.powerState.displayStatus)
| where (powerState in~ ({PowerState})) or ('*' in ({PowerState}))
| summarize Count = count() by VMSize = tostring(properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize)
| order by Count desc
| take 10
content.title: Top 10 VM Sizes (SKUs)

content.query:
Resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines'
| where (subscriptionId in~ ({Subscriptions})) or ('*' in ({Subscriptions}))
| where (resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroups})) or ('*' in ({ResourceGroups}))
| where (location in~ ({Locations})) or ('*' in ({Locations}))
| extend osType = tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.osType),
         offer = tostring(properties.storageProfile.imageReference.offer),
         sku = tostring(properties.storageProfile.imageReference.sku)
| where (osType in~ ({OSType})) or ('*' in ({OSType}))
| extend powerState = tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.powerState.displayStatus)
| where (powerState in~ ({PowerState})) or ('*' in ({PowerState}))
| extend OSImage = strcat(offer, ' / ', sku)
| summarize Count = count() by OSImage
| order by Count desc
content.title: OS Image Distribution

content.query:
Resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines'
| where (subscriptionId in~ ({Subscriptions})) or ('*' in ({Subscriptions}))
| where (resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroups})) or ('*' in ({ResourceGroups}))
| where (location in~ ({Locations})) or ('*' in ({Locations}))
| extend osType = tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.osType)
| where (osType in~ ({OSType})) or ('*' in ({OSType}))
| extend powerState = tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.powerState.displayStatus)
| where (powerState in~ ({PowerState})) or ('*' in ({PowerState}))
| summarize Count = count() by PowerState = powerState
| order by Count desc
content.title: Power State

content.json:
## VM Inventory

Full list with size, OS, network, disk and license details. Click any row to drill into the VM resource in the portal.

content.query:
Resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines'
| where (subscriptionId in~ ({Subscriptions})) or ('*' in ({Subscriptions}))
| where (resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroups})) or ('*' in ({ResourceGroups}))
| where (location in~ ({Locations})) or ('*' in ({Locations}))
| extend osType = tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.osType)
| where (osType in~ ({OSType})) or ('*' in ({OSType}))
| extend powerState = tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.powerState.displayStatus)
| where (powerState in~ ({PowerState})) or ('*' in ({PowerState}))
| extend vmSize = tostring(properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize),
         offer = tostring(properties.storageProfile.imageReference.offer),
         sku = tostring(properties.storageProfile.imageReference.sku),
         osDiskName = tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.name),
         osDiskGB = toint(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.diskSizeGB),
         dataDiskCount = array_length(properties.storageProfile.dataDisks),
         dataDiskGB = toint(array_sum(extract_all(@'"diskSizeGB":\s*(\d+)', tostring(properties.storageProfile.dataDisks)))),
         licenseType = tostring(properties.licenseType),
         zones = tostring(zones),
         availSet = tostring(properties.availabilitySet.id),
         identity = tostring(identity.type),
         nicId = tostring(properties.networkProfile.networkInterfaces[0].id),
         createdTime = tostring(properties.timeCreated)
| project ['VM Name']=name, Subscription=subscriptionId, ['Resource Group']=resourceGroup, Location=location, Zone=zones, ['Size']=vmSize, ['OS']=osType, ['Image']=strcat(offer,' / ',sku), ['Power']=powerState, ['OS Disk']=osDiskName, ['OS GB']=osDiskGB, ['Data Disks']=dataDiskCount, ['Data GB']=dataDiskGB, ['License']=licenseType, ['Identity']=identity, ['Created']=createdTime, Tags=tags, ['Resource Id']=id
| order by ['VM Name'] asc

content.json:
## Disks

All managed disks attached to the filtered VMs (OS + data), with SKU, size and encryption settings.

content.query:
Resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.compute/disks'
| where (subscriptionId in~ ({Subscriptions})) or ('*' in ({Subscriptions}))
| where (resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroups})) or ('*' in ({ResourceGroups}))
| where (location in~ ({Locations})) or ('*' in ({Locations}))
| extend attachedVM = tostring(split(tostring(managedBy), '/')[-1]),
         sizeGB = toint(properties.diskSizeGB),
         skuName = tostring(sku.name),
         skuTier = tostring(sku.tier),
         diskState = tostring(properties.diskState),
         encryptionType = tostring(properties.encryption.type),
         createdTime = tostring(properties.timeCreated)
| project ['Disk Name']=name, ['Attached VM']=attachedVM, ['Resource Group']=resourceGroup, Location=location, ['Size GB']=sizeGB, SKU=skuName, Tier=skuTier, State=diskState, Encryption=encryptionType, Created=createdTime, Subscription=subscriptionId
| order by ['Size GB'] desc

Resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.network/networkinterfaces'
| where (subscriptionId in~ ({Subscriptions})) or ('*' in ({Subscriptions}))
| where (resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroups})) or ('*' in ({ResourceGroups}))
| where (location in~ ({Locations})) or ('*' in ({Locations}))
| extend vmId = tostring(properties.virtualMachine.id),
         vmName = tostring(split(tostring(properties.virtualMachine.id), '/')[-1]),
         privateIp = tostring(properties.ipConfigurations[0].properties.privateIPAddress),
         publicIpId = tostring(properties.ipConfigurations[0].properties.publicIPAddress.id),
         subnetId = tostring(properties.ipConfigurations[0].properties.subnet.id),
         nsgId = tostring(properties.networkSecurityGroup.id),
         macAddress = tostring(properties.macAddress),
         acceleratedNetworking = tostring(properties.enableAcceleratedNetworking)
| where isnotempty(vmName)
| extend vnet = tostring(split(subnetId, '/')[8]),
         subnet = tostring(split(subnetId, '/')[-1]),
         nsg = tostring(split(nsgId, '/')[-1]),
         publicIp = tostring(split(publicIpId, '/')[-1])
| project ['VM']=vmName, ['NIC']=name, ['Private IP']=privateIp, ['Public IP']=publicIp, VNet=vnet, Subnet=subnet, NSG=nsg, ['Accel. Net']=acceleratedNetworking, MAC=macAddress, Location=location, Subscription=subscriptionId
| order by ['VM'] asc

content.json:
## SQL Server VMs

VMs deployed from SQL Server Marketplace images or registered with the SQL VM resource provider. Pure Linux SQL or self-installed SQL on Windows requires Log Analytics (see notes below).

content.query:
Resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.sqlvirtualmachine/sqlvirtualmachines'
| where (subscriptionId in~ ({Subscriptions})) or ('*' in ({Subscriptions}))
| where (resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroups})) or ('*' in ({ResourceGroups}))
| extend sqlImageOffer = tostring(properties.sqlImageOffer),
         sqlImageSku = tostring(properties.sqlImageSku),
         sqlMgmtType = tostring(properties.sqlManagement),
         sqlServerLicenseType = tostring(properties.sqlServerLicenseType),
         vmName = name
| join kind=leftouter (
    Resources
    | where type =~ 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines'
    | extend vmSize = tostring(properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize),
             powerState = tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.powerState.displayStatus),
             osDiskGB = toint(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.diskSizeGB)
    | project vmName=name, vmSize, powerState, osDiskGB, resourceGroup, vmLocation=location
) on vmName
| project ['VM Name']=vmName, ['Resource Group']=resourceGroup, ['Location']=vmLocation, ['Size']=vmSize, ['Power']=powerState, ['SQL Edition']=sqlImageSku, ['SQL Image']=sqlImageOffer, ['Management']=sqlMgmtType, ['License']=sqlServerLicenseType, ['Subscription']=subscriptionId
| order by ['VM Name'] asc

RecoveryServicesResources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.recoveryservices/vaults/backupfabrics/protectioncontainers/protecteditems'
| where (subscriptionId in~ ({Subscriptions})) or ('*' in ({Subscriptions}))
| where properties.backupManagementType == 'AzureIaasVM'
| extend vmId = tostring(properties.virtualMachineId),
         vmName = tostring(split(tostring(properties.virtualMachineId), '/')[-1]),
         policyName = tostring(properties.policyName),
         protectionState = tostring(properties.protectionState),
         lastBackupStatus = tostring(properties.lastBackupStatus),
         lastBackupTime = tostring(properties.lastBackupTime),
         lastRecoveryPoint = tostring(properties.lastRecoveryPoint),
         vaultName = tostring(split(id, '/')[8])
| project ['VM Name']=vmName, ['Vault']=vaultName, ['Policy']=policyName, ['Protection']=protectionState, ['Last Backup Status']=lastBackupStatus, ['Last Backup Time']=lastBackupTime, ['Last Recovery Point']=lastRecoveryPoint, ['Subscription']=subscriptionId
| order by ['Last Backup Time'] desc

Resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines'
| where (subscriptionId in~ ({Subscriptions})) or ('*' in ({Subscriptions}))
| where (resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroups})) or ('*' in ({ResourceGroups}))
| where (location in~ ({Locations})) or ('*' in ({Locations}))
| project vmId = tolower(id), vmName = name, resourceGroup, location, subscriptionId
| join kind=leftanti (
    RecoveryServicesResources
    | where type =~ 'microsoft.recoveryservices/vaults/backupfabrics/protectioncontainers/protecteditems'
    | where properties.backupManagementType == 'AzureIaasVM'
    | extend vmId = tolower(tostring(properties.virtualMachineId))
    | project vmId
) on vmId
| project ['VM Name']=vmName, ['Resource Group']=resourceGroup, ['Location']=location, ['Subscription']=subscriptionId
| order by ['VM Name'] asc

Resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.network/publicipaddresses'
| where (subscriptionId in~ ({Subscriptions})) or ('*' in ({Subscriptions}))
| where isnotempty(properties.ipAddress)
| extend assocId = tostring(properties.ipConfiguration.id),
         ip = tostring(properties.ipAddress),
         allocation = tostring(properties.publicIPAllocationMethod),
         sku = tostring(sku.name)
| where isnotempty(assocId)
| extend assocType = case(
    assocId contains '/networkInterfaces/', 'VM (via NIC)',
    assocId contains '/loadBalancers/', 'Load Balancer',
    assocId contains '/applicationGateways/', 'App Gateway',
    assocId contains '/bastionHosts/', 'Bastion',
    assocId contains '/azureFirewalls/', 'Firewall',
    'Other')
| extend nicName = iff(assocType == 'VM (via NIC)', tostring(split(assocId, '/')[-3]), '')
| project ['Public IP']=ip, Allocation=allocation, SKU=sku, ['Associated With']=assocType, ['NIC / Resource']=nicName, ['Resource Group']=resourceGroup, Location=location, Subscription=subscriptionId
| order by ['Public IP'] asc

content.json:
---

### Notes & limitations

- **Source:** This workbook is powered entirely by **Azure Resource Graph**, which only contains *Azure-level* metadata about VMs. It does **not** include in-guest data such as the OS computer name, drive letters, free space, installed software, or SQL databases.
- **To add in-guest data:** Onboard VMs to **Azure Monitor Agent (AMA)** with a **Log Analytics workspace** and enable **VM Insights** + the **ChangeTracking** solution. You can then add tabs to this workbook with KQL queries against tables like `Heartbeat`, `InsightsMetrics`, `ConfigurationData`, and `ConfigurationChange` for hostnames, drives, services, and installed software. SQL instance/db inventory can be pulled from `MSSQL-IaaS-VM` solution or custom Run Command data.
- **CPU / RAM per VM:** Resource Graph stores only the SKU name (e.g. `Standard_D4s_v5`). To resolve cores/RAM per SKU, either join client-side after export or maintain a static SKU lookup table. VM Insights surfaces this natively.
- **Pin to Azure Dashboard:** Click the pin icon on any tile/chart/table to add it to a shared Azure Portal Dashboard.
- **Required RBAC:** `Reader` on each subscription is enough for everything except backup, which also needs `Reader` on the Recovery Services vaults.
